messages.content: Today a girl came up to me and said: "Hi, uhm i wanted to tell you that ... looking at you in class caused me ... a little wet spot"
ll, that was a pleasant surprise! I will definitely have to thank her for that later.
ll, when a girl tells you that she caused a little wet spot looking at you, it means she is attracted to you.
